title: [DebugInfo][InstCombine] Do not overwrite prior DILocation for new Insts

tests.source_program:
define i32 @test_preassigned_dbg(i32 %x) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp eq i32 %x, 0, !dbg !1
  %sel = select i1 %cmp, i32 1, i32 %x, !dbg !2
  ret i32 %sel, !dbg !3
}
!1 = !DILocation(line: 1, column: 1, scope: !4)
!2 = !DILocation(line: 2, column: 2, scope: !4)
!3 = !DILocation(line: 3, column: 3, scope: !4)
!4 = distinct !DISubprogram(name: "test")
tests.expect_optimized_program:
define i32 @test_preassigned_dbg(i32 %x) {
entry:
  %sel = select i1 %x, i32 1, i32 0, !dbg !2
  ret i32 %sel, !dbg !3
}
!1 = !DILocation(line: 1, column: 1, scope: !4)
!2 = !DILocation(line: 2, column: 2, scope: !4)
!3 = !DILocation(line: 3, column: 3, scope: !4)
!4 = distinct !DISubprogram(name: "test")
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary mentions conditional copying but doesn't cover cases where InstCombine assigns a new DebugLoc during transformation - this tests that pre-assigned debug locations are preserved over old instruction locations

tests.source_program:
define void @test_debug_loc_preserved(i32 %a, i32 %b) !dbg !1 {
entry:
  %add = add i32 %a, %b, !dbg !2
  %mul = mul i32 %add, 2, !dbg !3
  %cmp = icmp eq i32 %mul, 0, !dbg !4
  br i1 %cmp, label %true, label %false, !dbg !5
true:
  ret void, !dbg !6
false:
  %shl = shl i32 %mul, 1, !dbg !7
  ret void, !dbg !8
}
!llvm.dbg.cu = !{!0}
!0 = distinct !DICompileUnit(language: DW_LANG_C, file: !1)
!1 = !DIFile(filename: "test.c", directory: "/")
!2 = !DILocation(line: 2, column: 1, scope: !0)
!3 = !DILocation(line: 3, column: 1, scope: !0)
!4 = !DILocation(line: 4, column: 1, scope: !0)
!5 = !DILocation(line: 5, column: 1, scope: !0)
!6 = !DILocation(line: 6, column: 1, scope: !0)
!7 = !DILocation(line: 7, column: 1, scope: !0)
!8 = !DILocation(line: 8, column: 1, scope: !0)

tests.outside_scope_reason: Tests scenario where InstCombine creates a new instruction that already has a DebugLoc assigned during transformation - the patch's conditional check (!Result->getDebugLoc()) should preserve the new instruction's debug loc rather than overwriting with old instruction's loc. Known test only covers cases where new instruction lacks debug loc.

true:

false:

  ret void, !dbg !8
}

; ModuleID = '<stdin>'
source_filename = "<stdin>"

define void @test_debug_loc_preserved(i32 %a, i32 %b) {
entry:
  %add = add i32 %a, %b
  %mul.mask = and i32 %add, 2147483647
  %cmp = icmp eq i32 %mul.mask, 0
  br i1 %cmp, label %true, label %false

true:                                             ; preds = %entry
  ret void

false:                                            ; preds = %entry
  ret void
}

tests.source_program:
define i32 @test_arithmetic(i32 %a, i32 %b) !dbg !0 {
entry:
  %add = add i32 %a, %b, !dbg !1
  %mul = mul i32 %add, 2, !dbg !2
  %ret = add i32 %mul, 0, !dbg !3
  ret i32 %ret, !dbg !4
}
!0 = distinct !DICompileUnit(language: DW_LANG_C99, file: !1)
!1 = !DIFile(filename: "test.c", directory: "/")
!2 = !DILocation(line: 5, column: 10, scope: !0)
!3 = !DILocation(line: 6, column: 12, scope: !0)
!4 = !DILocation(line: 7, column: 3, scope: !0)
tests.expect_optimized_program:
define i32 @test_arithmetic(i32 %a, i32 %b) !dbg !0 {
entry:
  %add = add i32 %a, %b, !dbg !1
  %mul = shl i32 %add, 1, !dbg !2
  ret i32 %mul, !dbg !4
}
!0 = distinct !DICompileUnit(language: DW_LANG_C99, file: !1)
!1 = !DIFile(filename: "test.c", directory: "/")
!2 = !DILocation(line: 5, column: 10, scope: !0)
!3 = !DILocation(line: 6, column: 12, scope: !0)
!4 = !DILocation(line: 7, column: 3, scope: !0)
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary focuses on phi nodes and load instructions, but this test covers arithmetic instruction combining (mul by 2 -> shl, add 0 elimination) with debug location preservation across multiple transformation steps

alive2.src:
define i32 @test_arithmetic(i32 %a, i32 %b) !dbg !0 {
entry:
  %add = add i32 %a, %b, !dbg !1
  %mul = mul i32 %add, 2, !dbg !2
  %ret = add i32 %mul, 0, !dbg !3
  ret i32 %ret, !dbg !4
}
